title: Built for macOS dynamic wallpapers
subtitle: Codelume delivers a native playback engine for local wallpaper bundles, with a focus on privacy, stability, and multi-screen control.

sandbox.title: macOS Sandbox
sandbox.description: Runs strictly within Apple’s sandbox rules for safer playback.

offline.title: Offline First
offline.description: No outbound network traffic and no data collection.

multiscreen.title: Per-Screen Control
multiscreen.description: Assign, pause, mute, and tune playback per display.

openSource.title: Open Source Core
openSource.description: Transparent codebase with App Store convenience.

jan-24-2026.title: Brand refresh & stability sweep
jan-24-2026.description: Renamed to Codelume, refreshed the welcome flow, ensured single-instance launch, and updated default assets.

jan-15-2026.title: Screen saver refactor
jan-15-2026.description: Streamlined the screen saver views and removed unused code paths.

jan-14-2026.title: System behavior hardening
jan-14-2026.description: Disabled log storage by default and refined Dock icon handling.

jan-13-2026.title: Privacy-first controls
jan-13-2026.description: Added Dock icon visibility controls, quick home access, and blocked outbound connections.

dec-25-2025.title: v1.4.0 release
dec-25-2025.description: Published v1.4.0 with fixes and performance improvements.

dec-23-2025.title: Backend integration
dec-23-2025.description: Introduced optional backend hooks for content workflows.

dec-22-2025.title: Main screen sync
dec-22-2025.description: Restarted playback on main-screen change and refined pause conditions.

dec-19-2025.title: Preview reliability fix
dec-19-2025.description: Resolved issues preventing preview windows from opening.
